overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing a character exploring an ancient Mycenaean city during golden hour. The character moves through rooftop terraces, enters a temple interior with red walls, and explores courtyards with pools and ceremonial gardens.

segments.scene_description: The character walks across a sunlit rooftop terrace featuring a decorative pool with floating flower petals. The view overlooks an ancient harbor city with stone buildings, while warm golden hour light illuminates the scene.

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a grand temple entrance sheltered by a red fabric awning supported by fluted stone columns. Golden ceremonial urns flank the doorway as the character enters the temple interior.

segments.scene_description: Inside the temple, the character moves through dimly lit spaces with red walls and patterned rugs. Large storage amphorae and ornate wooden screens line the path as the character approaches the bright exit doorway.

segments.scene_description: Exiting the temple, the character explores a sunlit courtyard featuring a rectangular pool, garden trees, and a wooden pergola. The character approaches and begins climbing a wide stone staircase.

passing large ceremonial offering baskets and columns on the terrace

segments.scene_description: The character ascends to an upper ceremonial terrace featuring large offering baskets overflowing with flower petals and decorated columns. Several people stand at the stone railing overlooking the city, silhouetted against the bright golden hour sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a sunlit rooftop terrace through the interior of a grand temple and back out into a ceremonial courtyard. It begins with a walk across a terrace featuring a decorative pool of floating petals, overlooking an ancient harbor city bathed in warm golden hour light. As the character approaches a grand entrance sheltered by a red fabric awning and fluted columns, the scene shifts from the bright exterior into a dimly lit temple interior characterized by red walls, patterned rugs, and large storage amphorae. The camera then follows the character through the temple toward a bright exit doorway, opening into a sunlit courtyard with a rectangular pool, garden trees, and a wooden pergola. Finally, the movement ascends a wide stone staircase to an upper ceremonial terrace filled with offering baskets, where figures stand silhouetted against the brilliant golden sun overlooking the city.
